bottlenecks.label: Strength Critical for Survival
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Mansion ($11.5M+) OR use Pier Pressure (free)
bottlenecks.detail: Strength provides damage resistance in all combat situations (not just melee). Low strength means you take significantly more damage from bullets, explosions, and falls. Critical for surviving Auto Shop contracts, heists, and PVP.

bottlenecks.label: Flying Skill Low
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Sparrow ($1.8M) OR do Flight School
bottlenecks.detail: No fast travel vehicle. Turbulence causes crashes and wastes time.

bottlenecks.label: No Kosatka Submarine
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Kosatka ($2.2M) from Warstock for Cayo Perico access (~$560k/hr solo)
bottlenecks.detail: Unlocks Cayo Perico Heist — a solid solo active income source (~$700k avg per run).

bottlenecks.label: No Auto Shop
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Auto Shop ($1.8M) for robbery contracts (~$400-600K/hr solo)
bottlenecks.detail: Union Depository contract pays ~$300K for 30 min work. Great solo active income.

bottlenecks.label: No Agency for Dre/Payphone
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Agency ($2M+) and complete setup missions
bottlenecks.detail: Agency unlocks Dr. Dre ($1M) and Payphone Hits (~250k/hr filler).

bottlenecks.label: Maximize Stamina
bottlenecks.solution: Run, bike, or swim regularly to build stamina
bottlenecks.detail: Allows unlimited sprinting. Required for Mansion Yoga buff (+15% run speed).

compactPlan.title: Fix Critical Strength Liability
compactPlan.why: Your Strength is 0% (0/5 bars). You take max damage. You cannot lead Heists safely.
compactPlan.methodDetails: Launch "Pier Pressure" alone. Go to the boardwalk. Punch pedestrians. Math: You need 800 punches to reach 40%. (~30 punches/min).
compactPlan.avoidMethod: Avoid: Golf (unless using "Infinite Putt" exploit). Normal golf takes 6+ hours.

compactPlan.title: San Andreas Flight School (0% â†’ 80%+)
compactPlan.why: Your Flying is 0% (0/5 bars). 80% below meta benchmark for heist leadership. Your Sparrow is unstable. Flight School fixes this AND pays ~$250k.
